17: MCP significantly broadens AI/LLM capabilities, making them more versatile and
18: powerful. Here are nine key use cases:
20: Database Integration: MCP allows LLMs and agents to seamlessly access and
21: interact with structured data in databases. For instance, using the MCP Toolbox
22: for Databases, an agent can query Google BigQuery datasets to retrieve real-time
23: information, generate reports, or update records, all driven by natural language
26: Generative Media Orchestration: MCP enables agents to integrate with
27: advanced generative media services. Through MCP Tools for Genmedia Services,
28: an agent can orchestrate workflows involving Google's Imagen for image
29: generation, Google's Veo for video creation, Google's Chirp 3 HD for realistic
30: voices, or Google's Lyria for music composition, allowing for dynamic content
33: External API Interaction: MCP provides a standardized way for LLMs to call and
34: receive responses from any external API. This means an agent can fetch live
35: weather data, pull stock prices, send emails, or interact with CRM systems,
36: extending its capabilities far beyond its core language model.
38: Reasoning-Based Information Extraction: Leveraging an LLM's strong
39: reasoning skills, MCP facilitates effective, query-dependent information
